hooks.command:
cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)}" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; [ -d infrastructure ] || exit 0; cd infrastructure || exit 0; out=""; rc=0; validate_out=$(terraform validate 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then out="${out}--- terraform validate ---
${validate_out}
"; rc=1; fi; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then printf '%b' "$out" | jq -Rs '{decision:"block",reason:("Terraform checks failed. Fix before finishing turn:

" + .)}'; fi; exit 0

cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)}" 2>/dev/null; out=$(make lint 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then printf '%s' "$out" | jq -Rs --arg rc "$rc" '{decision:"block",reason:("Phase 0 exit criteria failed (make lint exit=" + $rc + "). Fix lint errors before finishing turn:\n\n" + .)}'; fi; exit 0
